group.description: Core OSGi bundle concepts: identifies bundles, extracts metadata (version, name, vendor, activator, activation policy, execution environment), resolves fragments and Require-Bundle dependencies.

concept.description: Labels JAR archives containing a Bundle-SymbolicName manifest header as :Osgi:Bundle and sets the bundleSymbolicName property.
concept.cypher: MATCH (jar:Jar:Archive)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry) WHERE entry.name = "Bundle-SymbolicName" WITH jar, CASE WHEN entry.value CONTAINS ";" THEN trim(split(entry.value, ";")[0]) ELSE trim(entry.value) END AS symbolicName SET jar:Osgi:Bundle, jar.bundleSymbolicName = symbolicName RETURN jar.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName

concept.description: Sets the bundleVersion property on OSGi bundles from the Bundle-Version manifest header.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Version"}) SET bundle.bundleVersion = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.bundleVersion AS Version

concept.description: Sets the bundleName property on OSGi bundles from the Bundle-Name manifest header.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Name"}) SET bundle.bundleName = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.bundleName AS Name

concept.description: Sets the bundleVendor property on OSGi bundles from the Bundle-Vendor manifest header.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Vendor"}) SET bundle.bundleVendor = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.bundleVendor AS Vendor

concept.description: Sets the singleton property to true on OSGi bundles declared as singleton in the Bundle-SymbolicName header.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-SymbolicName"}) WHERE toLower(entry.value) CONTAINS "singleton:=true" SET bundle.singleton = true RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS SingletonBundle

concept.description: Sets the bundleActivator property and creates a relationship from the bundle to its activator class.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Activator"}) SET bundle.bundleActivator = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.bundleActivator AS Activator

concept.description: Sets the activationPolicy property on bundles with Bundle-ActivationPolicy: lazy.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-ActivationPolicy"}) SET bundle.activationPolicy = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.activationPolicy AS ActivationPolicy

concept.description: Sets the requiredExecutionEnvironment property from the Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment manifest header.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment"}) SET bundle.requiredExecutionEnvironment = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleSymbolicName, bundle.requiredExecutionEnvironment AS ExecutionEnvironment

concept.description: Labels bundles with a Fragment-Host header as :Osgi:Fragment and extracts the host bundle symbolic name.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Fragment-Host"}) WITH bundle, CASE WHEN entry.value CONTAINS ";" THEN trim(split(entry.value, ";")[0]) ELSE trim(entry.value) END AS hostSymbolicName, entry.value AS rawValue SET bundle:Osgi:Fragment, bundle.fragmentHostSymbolicName = hostSymbolicName, bundle.fragmentHostRaw = rawValue RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Fragment, hostSymbolicName AS FragmentHost

concept.description: Creates FRAGMENT_OF relationships from fragment bundles to their host bundles (when the host exists in the graph).
concept.cypher: MATCH (fragment:Osgi:Fragment), (host:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE fragment.fragmentHostSymbolicName = host.bundleSymbolicName AND NOT (fragment)-[:FRAGMENT_OF]->(host) CREATE (fragment)-[:FRAGMENT_OF]->(host) RETURN fragment.bundleSymbolicName AS Fragment, host.bundleSymbolicName AS Host

concept.description: Parses the Require-Bundle manifest header and creates REQUIRES_BUNDLE relationships between bundles (as intermediate nodes with symbolicName and versionRange).
Creates RESOLVES_TO relationships from RequiredBundle nodes to the actual Bundle they refer to (when present in the graph).
concept.cypher: MATCH (rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle), (target:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE rb.symbolicName = target.bundleSymbolicName AND NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target) CREATE (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(target) RETURN rb.symbolicName AS RequiredBundle, target.bundleSymbolicName AS ResolvedTo
